title: Dev-Env responsive — panes become tabs on mobile

segments.text: On a phone, the dev-env becomes tabs
segments.subtitle: garrison · dev-env responsive — one full-screen pane at a time, switched from a Claude / Shell / Browser control

beats.caption: At phone width the panes collapse into a Claude / Shell / Browser switcher
beats.expectedScreen: a narrow phone-width dev-env: the header wraps to a 3-way segmented switcher with tabs Claude (active, green), Shell, Browser, above the Claude pane

beats.caption: Shell — the terminal deck, full-screen
beats.expectedScreen: the Shell tab now active; the terminal deck full-screen showing 'No terminals open' and a + New terminal button

beats.caption: Browser — the live browser pane, now reachable on mobile (it used to be hidden)
beats.expectedScreen: the Browser tab now active; the browser pane full-width with a URL bar (http://127.0.0.1:4321) plus DevTools and Refresh, and the embedded app iframe filling the rest — no close button on mobile

segments.text: Responsive: desktop keeps the split, mobile turns the panes — including the browser — into tabs
segments.subtitle: Claude · Shell · Browser, one tap apart
